basic_details.job_title: NIT Durgapur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Durgapur (NIT Durgapur) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website nitdgp.ac.in. A total of 1 Junior Research Fellow vacancy has been announced through the NIT Durgapur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.E/M.Tech in Chemical Engineering or allied subjects with minimum 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA, M.Sc. in Biotechnology/Chemistry/Environmental Science/Microbiology/Biochemistry/Nanotechnology with valid NET/GATE and minimum 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow: M.E/M.Tech in Chemical Engineering / Chemical Technology/Biotechnology/Nanotechnology/Mechanical Engg/Biochemistry/Environmental Engg/ Civil Engg/ Bioprocess Engg/Microbiology or allied subject with a minimum of 6.5 CGPA or 60% marks from any recognized Institute / University. OR M.Sc. in Biotechnology/Chemistry/Environmental Science/Microbiology/Biochemistry/Nanotechnology with valid NET/GATE score and with a minimum of 6.5 CGPA or 60% marks from any recognized Institute / University. Working experience in the field of membrane-driven wastewater treatment technology or related field with publications is preferable. NET /GATE qualified candidate will be preferred. Selected candidate must register for PhD program under this project.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- + HRA per month for 1st and 2nd year and Rs. 42,000/- + HRA per month for the 3rd year

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Durgapur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 28-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NIT Durgapur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NIT Durgapur Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

NIT Durgapur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow: M.E/M.Tech in Chemical Engineering / Chemical Technology/Biotechnology/Nanotechnology/Mechanical Engg/Biochemistry/Environmental Engg/ Civil Engg/ Bioprocess Engg/Microbiology or allied subject with a minimum of 6.5 CGPA or 60% marks from any recognized Institute / University. OR M.Sc. in Biotechnology/Chemistry/Environmental Science/Microbiology/Biochemistry/Nanotechnology with valid NET/GATE score and with a minimum of 6.5 CGPA or 60% marks from any recognized Institute / University. Working experience in the field of membrane-driven wastewater treatment technology or related field with publications is preferable. NET /GATE qualified candidate will be preferred. Selected candidate must register for PhD program under this project.

content_sections.heading: NIT Durgapur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Salary
content_sections.text: Rs. 37,000/- + HRA per month for 1st and 2nd year and Rs. 42,000/- + HRA per month for the 3rd year

content_sections.heading: NIT Durgapur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
NIT Durgapur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Durgapur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 28-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Durgapur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Durgapur?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 28th July 2026. It is advisable to send your application well in advance of this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have an M.E/M.Tech in Chemical Engineering or allied subjects with at least 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA. Alternatively, an M.Sc. in Biotechnology, Chemistry, Environmental Science, Microbiology, Biochemistry, or Nanotechnology with a valid NET/GATE score and minimum 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA is also accepted.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive, as per the provided information.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 37,000/- + HRA per month for the first and second year, and Rs. 42,000/- + HRA per month for the third year.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your bio-data, attach required documents, and send it to the official email address before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Durgapur through this recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an in-person interview.

faq.question: Q8. Does NIT Durgapur offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify any age limits or relaxation details. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for this information.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of NIT Durgapur?
faq.answer: The official website of the National Institute of Technology Durgapur is https://nitdgp.ac.in. You can visit this site for more information about the institute and its activities.

faq.question: Q10. Is it mandatory to have a NET/GATE score for the M.Sc. qualification?
faq.answer: Yes, for candidates applying with an M.Sc. degree, a valid NET/GATE score is a mandatory requirement along with the minimum percentage of marks or CGPA.
